articles.title: Alexa+ now generates podcast episodes on demand - About Amazon
articles.description: A new feature creates AI-generated audio episodes on any topic, ready to listen wherever you are.
articles.content: A new interaction model lets you browse, customize, and build your orders naturallywithout the typical back and forth.

articles.title: LG will release the first 1000Hz, 1080p gaming monitor this year - The Verge
articles.description: LG’s 24.5-inch UltraGear 25G590B gaming monitor will be the first 1000Hz 1080p display when it launches in the second half of 2026.
articles.content: The 25G590B is a 24.5-inch IPS screen with the highest refresh rate weve seen for a 1080p gaming monitor. The 25G590B is a 24.5-inch IPS screen with the highest… [+2725 chars]
articles.summary: LG’s 24.5-inch UltraGear 25G590B gaming monitor will be the first 1000Hz 1080p display when it launches in the second half of 2026.
